name: david-tools
description: David's public Claude Code marketplace. Hosts the TDD Playbook plugin — the universal engineering/QA habits that apply in every repo, on every surface (local, web, mobile). Public so cloud sandboxes can load it without auth; contains no secrets.

plugins.name: tdd-playbook
plugins.description: Universal TDD/QA Playbook (auto-firing skill) + enforcement hooks, scaffolding commands, and verification agents. Composes with repo-local testing conventions.
